top_signals.title: ECB Officials Stay Alert as Lane Shifts Focus to Price Pipeline
top_signals.summary: European Central Bank officials insisted the inflation shock caused by the Iran war can’t yet be judged to be over, even if hostilities have largely ceased.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Singapore Households Face Record Power Bills on War’s Impact
top_signals.summary: Power bills for households in Singapore will hit a record high next quarter as the impact of the US-Iran war feeds through, highlighting the inflationary fallout from the conflict even as regional tensions ease.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin's correlation with dollar-yen rate hits -0.90, undercutting 'carry trade' theory
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: EU Cuts Tariff-Free Steel Quota 33% For Close Trade Partners
top_signals.summary: The European Union will reserve half of its steel quotas for countries with free-trade deals under new measures meant to protect local industry from mostly Chinese imports.

top_signals.title: Permian natural gas production increased faster than crude oil
top_signals.summary: The Permian region's marketed natural gas production grew from 17.2 billion cubic feet per day (Bcf/d) in 2021 to 27.6 Bcf/d in 2025, a 60% increase, according to data from our latest Short Term Energy Outlook. Over the same period, crude oil production grew by 39%, going from 4.7 million barrels per day (b/d) to 6.6 million b/d. The higher growth in natural gas production is the result of increasing gas-oil ratios (GOR).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: French biotech stock soars 34% after new data on experimental medicine
top_signals.summary: Shares of French biotech company Abivax soared Tuesday after it released fresh data on its lead drug for bowel disease.

top_signals.title: Apple seeks to buy memory chips from blacklisted Chinese company - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: Apple seeks to buy memory chips from blacklisted Chinese company  Financial Times
